description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a light brown finish, reinforced by a white band near the grip area. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. A detachable box magazine is mounted below the receiver, and a large cylindrical suppressor is attached to the end of the barrel. The rifle is equipped with a modern optical sight mounted on top, enhancing its targeting capabilities. The overall design blends traditional and contemporary elements, making it suitable for both historical and urban tactical scenarios.
description: A wood-stocked rifle with a metal receiver, suppressor, optical sight, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metal receiver, suppressor, optical sight, and magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the suppressor, sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, suppressor, and magazine from the left.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view emphasizing the suppressor and the circular profile of the muzzle.
